sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109465" key="u(pourghmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπουργ-ημᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n109465.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making use of such service,</tr_> Sch.D.T.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0032.tlg008.perseus-grc1:p.111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.111</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
